name: Hero Vs 1000
short_description: Experience the adrenaline of facing countless hordes of enemies in an unparalleled challenge! Command a knight, a pirate and a soldier in epic battles, each with 1000 opponents waiting to test your courage and skill.
detailed_description:
Hero vs 1000 is an action game focused on combat against hordes of enemies. Face your opponents in different ways to show your skill and determination on the battlefield.

Embark on an epic journey through three distinct eras! Lead a medieval knight, a fearless Caribbean pirate, and a modern soldier against hordes of ruthless opponents. Take on the challenge of defeating 1000 enemies in each level and write your own tale of bravery!

Weapons

Buy weapons and unlock new ways to fight your opponents.

Achievements

Show off your combat skills by eliminating enemies in different ways and earn achievements.

Replayability

Face the enemies in each phase as many times as you want and in the combat style you prefer.

supported_languages: English, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Turkish
